programmes.show_description: The Gold Devils move their multi-million-dollar operation in search of big gold. And, new team Vince, Bibi and Murray break ground on their dream lease. S8, Ep2
Forsaken. Sparks don't fly deep in the Panamanian jungle, an ex-cop and a self-described wild child clash over cuddling- before the challenge overwhelms one of them. S2, Ep13
Contamination. After a typhoon scatters debris through a Philippine forest, a stay-at-home mum and stubborn trucker combat sickness and no food to survive. S2, Ep14
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Virginia Victorian Home. The Salvage Dawgs travel to Hot Springs to salvage a late Victorian-style home. They recover cabinets, sinks, and a round window. S7, Ep3
Wayne Lanes Bowling Alley. The Salvage Dawgs go to Wayne Lanes in Waynesboro to salvage bowling balls, bowling pins, bowling shoes and whatever else they can find in the alley. S7, Ep4
Innovate & Overcome. In a race against winter, Shawn extends his sluice to get more gold. As Kris battles a bed of quartz, George enjoys a season-ending dive with his son. S7, Ep9
King Of Nome. Desperate to be Nome's gold king, Shawn risks the Christine Rose in dangerous waters. Plus, Ken struggles to free the Myrtle from the harbour. S7, Ep10
The Gold Gypsies could be sitting on a fortune but must decide whether to take a huge gamble. A water shortage halts Shane and Russell's operations. S5, Ep10
The Dracula Monkey Of Borneo. In Indonesia, Forrest seeks the Millers Grizzled Langur, or Dracula monkey. When he hears of an illegal pet market, his search becomes a rescue mission. S2, Ep9
The Bitter, Bloody End. The fleet head back out on the perilous waters of the Bering Sea for the final stretch of a merciless opilio season. Will they all make it back safely? S8, Ep16
Dangerous Waters. Darrell finds the final piece to Cooper's code, but hiring a crew presents new danger as he discloses his secret mission. On the water, there's a big discovery. S1, Ep4
Digging Into D-Day. Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a huge German bunker complex buried for 75 years. S6, Ep12
All The Pretty Horses. The Raneys help a family with dreams of a horse rescue. Misty builds a multi-tier garden and duck pond, and Marty constructs a horse barn. S4, Ep12
Back In The Saddle. With a major setback in Misty's build, the Raneys race the clock in their rescue of a Texas homestead. Matt builds a hog trap for an additional food resource. S4, Ep13
Diesel Doozies. Drowning in a sea of overburden, The Blacklighters face off against each other as Mark's inexperience with the dozer proves too much for Paul. S7, Ep12
A Festival Of Opal. On the eve of the famous Lightning Ridge Opal Festival, The Misfits battle to treat 150kg of matrix opal, forcing Cody to cook up a miracle. S7, Ep13
Bad Blood. Accidents hit the decks. As winter rocks the fleet with huge swells and strong winds, the Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on a rookie. On the Wizard, mutiny is looming. S14, Ep12
Captain Conflict. Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. Plus, tension between co-captains reaches breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse. S14, Ep13
Terror In Appalachia. Phil and Jess venture into the Great Smoky Mountains to investigate missing hiker reports and sightings of grotesque human-like creatures. S3, Ep1
Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot. Josh Gates delves into Wild West lore to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada. S4, Ep4
The Ferals are on the gold when a four-wheeler crash leaves them man down. Plus, the Poseidon Crew battle to overcome a catastrophic mechanical failure. S8, Ep3
All Falls Down. An elite endurance athlete and a sensitive stay-at-home dad team up in the Belize jungle where they face jaguars, venomous snakes, falling trees, and powerful storms. S2, Ep15
The Darkest Hour. Mountain man Joe and former cop Andrea take on Namibia. This vast land is home to dangerous creatures, including the deadly hippopotamus. S2, Ep16

Teleshopping.
Return To Ludwig Mansion. The Salvage Dawgs go back to the Ludwig mansion in Pennsylvania to pick up everything they left behind after their first salvage. S7, Ep5
Victorian Free Classic House. The team salvages a home in Hot Springs with great Eastlake hardware and Majorca tile, mantles and pocket doors. S7, Ep6
Double Down. In Nome, Alaska, the summer gold mining season kicks off. The Kellys hope to repeat the success of last season and Kris leads his team with a newfound determination. S8, Ep1
Unleash The Beast. Shawn is able to dig deeper than ever before, but he's also fighting to keep his family dynasty. Meanwhile, veteran skipper Vernon has rebuilt his war chest. S8, Ep2
The Goldtimers hire a 7-tonne loader to end their gold drought. The Dust Devils risk running out of water. Marcus vanishes while clifftop detecting. S5, Ep11
The Caribbean Monk Seal. Forrest sets off on a dangerous, shark-infested search for the extinct Caribbean monk seal. He and the crew come face-to-face with a giant tiger shark. S2, Ep10
Mutiny on the Bering Sea. It's October in Dutch Harbour Alaska, and after a devastating 2011 season, every ship in the fleet is looking to make a comeback in the 2012 season. S9, Ep1
Dagger in the Back. It's cloak and dagger time on the Bering Sea as Keith and Junior form a covert alliance, and Elliot finally debuts his new boat on the dangerous crab grounds. S9, Ep2
Moving Target. Following the Columbus trail, bad weather strikes and Darrell dives past the limits of his gear into extreme danger. Plus, a huge discovery changes everything. S1, Ep5
The Secret Solved. One of the puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh Gates has been chasing for years, might have been solved. Will the solution be in his hometown? S6, Ep13
The Warrior Queen's Treasure. Josh Gates searches across England to unearth a cache of ancient treasures belonging to the legendary Celtic queen, Boudica. S6, Ep16
It Takes A Village. The Raneys find a Montana homestead struggling through food, predator and power problems. Marty and Matt enlist a community of firefighters to help. S4, Ep14
Bench Marks. Oscar sends The Cheals on an important mission to unearth a rare green-orange gemstone for a potential buyer. The Mooka Boys get a motor problem. S7, Ep14
Trucking Fun. The Bushmen dig a newly drilled emergency shaft. The Mooka Boys are on a dangerous mission to crane a vital DIY shelter across the Lunatic Opal Field. S7, Ep15
Baptism By Fire. It's baptism by fire aboard the Northwestern as Mandy takes her first shift in heavy seas. Plus, the Wizard crew battles over one man who isn't pulling his weight. S14, Ep14
Supermoon Storm. An epic supermoon storm wreaks havoc on tides. The Coast Guard attempts a rescue mission, while Wild Bill faces his worst nightmare as a greenhorn goes overboard. S14, Ep15
Officer risk their own safety as they chase a potentially lethal driver in a high-speed pursuit, and a rookie cop is assaulted as he tries to calm an angry man. S5, Ep4
Necessary Force. Response Officers Alysha and Amy are on the hunt for a teenager with a firearm. GG and Carl come to the rescue when a colleague is assaulted by a drunken reveller. S1, Ep3
